# Project Workflow Instructions

## Environment Setup
- This project requires Node.js version defined in `.nvmrc`. 
- Always remind the user to run `nvm use` before installing dependencies.

## Package Management
- Use **pnpm** exclusively. Do not use npm or yarn.
- To install dependencies: `pnpm install`
- To run the dev server: `pnpm dev`
- To build the project: `pnpm build`

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Vite + React/Vue
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
